name: Dain Veythor
sd_appearance: a towering dragonborn figure, obsidian-black scales shimmering with faint silver serpentine patterns along their jagged, backward-curving horns, eyes glinting like fractured amber beneath a brow ridge of cracked obsidian, their tail coiled tightly around one leg like a serpent restraining its own fury, clad in scuffed, enchanted plate armor bearing the Tower Authority’s crimson sigil and a jagged, rusted longsword slung at their hip, their gloved hand gripping a heavy crossbow with a grip worn smooth by years of precision enforcement, the faint scent of ozone lingering from recent discharges.
faction_visual: rank-appropriate gear from leather to enchanted plate, Guild badge displayed
style_note: armour maintained to standard, rank markings clearly displayed
